message:
fix(service): release pending slot before buffer transitions to Error state to prevent counter leak

src/service/buffer.rs — When a buffered service call transitions to the
Error state after a poll failure, the pending counter is now decremented
and ready_wakers are drained before the state change. Previously, call()
incremented the pending counter but the Error/Done states do not carry the
shared handle, and Drop only decrements for WaitingForReady/Active states.
This caused a permanent pending counter leak that would eventually prevent
new calls from being admitted to the buffer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
